note: BRAIN layer — Day 35 (Friday). Batch 5 Ryedale data still NOT received. IMAP gap now 28 days. KEY DISCOVERY THIS RUN: Monday 2026-05-05 is UK May Day bank holiday — DO NOT send on Monday 2026-05-05 under any circumstances. Send Tuesday 2026-05-06 AM instead. Post-bank-holiday Tuesday is the confirmed #1 yield trigger in this campaign (all 3 INTERESTED replies arrived on Tuesday 2026-04-07, post-Easter Monday). The delay costs 24 hours but gains the highest-yield send window available. Campaign stall now 25 days.
today_outreach: ZERO sends. No active sequences. No Batch 5 data. Contingency fu_041-045 still actionable if IMAP confirms no prior reply.

bank_holiday_alert.type: UK May Day Early May Bank Holiday
bank_holiday_alert.impact_rating: CRITICAL — changes entire Batch 5 send strategy
bank_holiday_alert.detail: UK May Day bank holiday falls Monday 2026-05-05. SMEs will not be at their desks or checking email. Tuesday 2026-05-06 becomes the first working day of the week. This is the EXACT pattern that produced all 3 INTERESTED replies on Easter-week Tuesday 2026-04-07 (post-Easter Monday). Business owners return from a long weekend, catch up on email, and are in a more considered state. Do NOT send on Monday even if Batch 5 data arrives today. The 24-hour wait for Tuesday is worth it.
bank_holiday_alert.historical_evidence: All 3 INTERESTED replies (Claire, Rob, Tom) arrived on Tuesday 2026-04-07 — the first working day after Easter Monday 2026-04-06. The same dynamic applies to Tuesday 2026-05-06 (first working day after May Day 2026-05-05).

imap_status: CRITICAL OVERDUE — 28 days. Sweep entire cohort before any sends or LinkedIn outreach. Warm pipeline leads 3, 22, 1 are LinkedIn-unlocked today (buffer expired). IMAP must precede any LinkedIn approach for these leads.

batch_5_status.status: CRITICAL — 25-day campaign stall. No active sequences. No warm pipeline.

send_schedule_bank_holiday_revised.note: Bank holiday on Monday 2026-05-05 removes Monday as an option. ALL Batch 5 initial sends now target TUESDAY 2026-05-06 AM regardless of when data arrives.

if_data_arrives_today_friday_2026_05_02.assessment: OPTIMAL SCHEDULE — three of four touchpoints land on Tuesday AM (peak yield day). Day-7 and Day-14 are also Tuesdays.
if_data_arrives_today_friday_2026_05_02.yield_multiplier: Expected ~15% INTERESTED from SSL-PAS initial sends on a post-bank-holiday Tuesday (same yield driver as Easter week)

if_data_arrives_monday_bank_holiday.note: If HANDS somehow receives data on the bank holiday Monday — BRAIN runs Monday evening, sends still Tuesday 2026-05-06.

send_schedule_bank_holiday_revised.no_monday_sends_ever: DO NOT send initial Batch 5 emails on Monday 2026-05-05 under any scenario.
send_schedule_bank_holiday_revised.send_rate: Max 15 initial sends per batch. 8-10 minute stagger between sends.

scraping_instructions.return_format: business_name, url_or_no_website_flag, review_count, rating, town, category, phone
scraping_instructions.do_not_enrich: BRAIN enriches on next run — HANDS returns raw scrape data only
scraping_instructions.ssl_check_required: YES — check each URL for HTTP vs HTTPS. Tag ssl=true/false. This is the primary signal.
scraping_instructions.mobile_check: Secondary — Playwright screenshot or PageSpeed API check at mobile viewport
scraping_instructions.no_website_flag: If no website found via Google Maps listing, flag no_website=true

signal_assignment_note: No leads to assign signals to. All signal assignments await Batch 5 Ryedale raw data. When data arrives, BRAIN runs full waterfall same session.

waterfall_logic.confirmed_winner: ssl → PAS → first-name subject — 3/3 INTERESTED leads used this exact combination. Non-negotiable core of Batch 5.

priority_1.notes: Use for all HTTP sites. Reference the specific URL in the body. SSL is the strongest pain-to-action trigger in the campaign.

priority_2.expected_rate: 0% direct confirmed — Tom Day-7 validates as slow-burn secondary signal.
priority_2.notes: Use when ssl=false AND mobile failure is clear. Day-7 pivot to SSL (if HTTP) or competitor comparison.

priority_3.subject_pattern: [Business name] — [town] [trade]: customers can't find you online
priority_3.qualification: 4★+ AND 20+ reviews (Ryedale lowered bar from 50+ in Batch 4 — rural offline economy)
priority_3.expected_rate: 0% in Batch 4. Lowered bar and more concrete reference for Batch 5.
priority_3.notes: Reference their Google Maps listing: 'I searched plumber Malton — [business] doesn't appear.'

priority_4.subject_pattern: [First name] — [N] reviews but [keyword] in [town] isn't bringing you up
priority_4.expected_rate: 0% in Batch 4. Keyword-gap angle pivot for Batch 5.
priority_4.notes: Specific keyword: 'plumber Malton' or 'electrician Pickering'. Verifiable, not abstract.
